get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific MySQL discovery site, including its configuration, associated resources, and current operational status.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the MySQL discovery site information, including site configuration, linked master site, and migrate project details.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

put.summary: Create or update MySQL discovery site
put.description: Creates a new MySQL discovery site or updates an existing one. This operation establishes the discovery environment for MySQL servers and configures the association with master sites and migration projects.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The MySQL discovery site configuration including master site reference, migrate project association, and extended location details.

200.description: The MySQL discovery site was successfully updated with the new configuration parameters.

201.description: A new MySQL discovery site was successfully created.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

delete.description: Permanently removes a MySQL discovery site and all its associated discovery data. This operation cannot be undone and will stop all ongoing discovery processes for the site.

200.description: The MySQL discovery site has been successfully deleted along with all associated discovery data and configurations.

204.description: The MySQL discovery site was not found or has already been deleted. No action was performed.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

patch.description: Partially updates specific properties of an existing MySQL discovery site without replacing the entire resource. Use this operation to modify tags or update site configuration parameters.

200.description: The MySQL discovery site properties were successfully updated and are now active.

202.description: The update request for the MySQL discovery site has been accepted and is being processed. Check the operation status using the provided location header.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

202.description: The refresh operation has been accepted and initiated.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

get.summary: List MySQL discovery sites in resource group
get.description: Retrieves all MySQL discovery sites within a specific resource group, providing an overview of discovery environments and their current status.

200.description: Retrieves the MySQLSites resource.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

get.summary: List MySQL discovery sites in subscription
get.description: Retrieves all MySQL discovery sites across all resource groups within a subscription, providing a comprehensive view of MySQL discovery environments.

200.description: Retrieves the MySQLSites resource.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive information about a specific discovered MySQL server, including version details, database count, host machine properties, and current support status.

200.description: Retrieves the MySQLServers resource.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

put.summary: Create or update discovered MySQL server information
put.description: Creates or updates the discovery record for a MySQL server with detailed configuration, version information, database metrics, and host machine properties.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The MySQL server discovery information including host details, version, databases, and machine properties.

200.description: The MySQL server discovery information was successfully updated with the latest configuration and metrics.

201.description: A new MySQL server discovery record was successfully created with the provided configuration and properties.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

delete.description: Removes a MySQL server from the discovery inventory, deleting all associated discovery data and metrics for the specified server.

200.description: The MySQL server was successfully removed from discovery inventory along with all associated data and metrics.

204.description: The MySQL server was not found in the discovery inventory or has already been removed. No action was performed.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

patch.description: Partially updates specific properties of a discovered MySQL server without replacing the entire discovery record. Use this operation to update tags, labels, or specific server metrics.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The updated properties for the MySQL server discovery record, including modified tags, labels, or server-specific attributes.

200.description: The MySQL server discovery properties were successfully updated and are now active in the inventory.

202.description: The update request for the MySQL server discovery record has been accepted and is being processed.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

get.summary: List discovered MySQL servers in discovery site
get.description: Retrieves all MySQL servers discovered within a specific discovery site.

200.description: Retrieves the MySQLServers resource.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

get.description: Retrieves a comprehensive summary report for MySQL discovery operations within a site, including the total number of discovered servers and any errors encountered during discovery.

parameters.name: summaryName
parameters.description: The unique identifier name of the summary report to retrieve from the discovery site.

200.description: Retrieves the Summaries resource.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

get.description: Retrieves all available summary reports for a MySQL discovery site, providing an overview of discovery statistics.

200.description: Retrieves the Summaries resource.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

get.description: Retrieves detailed error summary information for MySQL discovery operations, including the count of affected objects and specific error details encountered during discovery processes.

parameters.name: errorSummaryName
parameters.description: The unique identifier name of the error summary report to retrieve from the discovery site.

200.description: Retrieves the ErrorSummaries resource.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

get.description: Retrieves all error summary reports for a MySQL discovery site, providing comprehensive information about discovery issues, affected objects, and troubleshooting details.

200.description: Retrieves the ErrorSummaries resource.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific MySQL discovery agent, including its health status, service principal configuration, and associated appliance details.

200.description: Retrieves the Agents resource.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

put.summary: Create or update MySQL discovery agent
put.description: Creates a new MySQL discovery agent or updates an existing one with service principal credentials, appliance configuration, and fabric site association for performing MySQL discovery operations.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The discovery agent configuration including service principal identity details, appliance name, and fabric site information for MySQL discovery operations.

200.description: The MySQL discovery agent was successfully updated with the new configuration and is ready for discovery operations.

201.description: A new MySQL discovery agent was successfully created and configured for performing discovery operations within the site.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

delete.description: Permanently removes a MySQL discovery agent from the site, stopping all discovery operations performed by this agent and cleaning up associated configurations.

200.description: The MySQL discovery agent was successfully removed and all associated discovery operations have been stopped.

204.description: The MySQL discovery agent was not found or has already been removed. No action was performed.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

patch.description: Partially updates specific properties of a MySQL discovery agent, such as health details or configuration parameters, without replacing the entire agent resource.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The updated properties for the MySQL discovery agent, such as modified health details or configuration parameters.

200.description: The MySQL discovery agent properties were successfully updated and the changes are now active.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

get.summary: List MySQL discovery agents in site
get.description: Retrieves all MySQL discovery agents configured within a specific discovery site, including their health status, configuration details, and operational information.

200.description: Retrieves the Agents resource.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

post.description: Initiates a refresh operation for a specific MySQL discovery agent to re-discover MySQL servers, update configurations, and synchronize with the latest environment state.

202.description: The agent refresh operation has been accepted and initiated. Use the Location header URL to monitor the progress of the discovery refresh process.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

get.description: Retrieves a comprehensive list of all available operations for the MySQL Discovery Service, including operation details, descriptions, and supported HTTP methods.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the complete list of MySQL Discovery Service operations with their descriptions and capabilities.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

ProvisioningState.description: Indicates the current provisioning state of the MySQL Discovery resource, representing the progress and status of resource deployment operations.

values.name: Unknown
values.description: The provisioning state is unknown or has not been determined yet.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: The provisioning operation has completed successfully.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: The provisioning operation has been canceled.

SupportStatus.description: Indicates the current support lifecycle status of the MySQL server version, helping determine migration urgency and available support options.

values.name: OutOfSupport
values.description: The MySQL version is no longer supported by the vendor and should be migrated to a supported version urgently.

values.name: Extended
values.description: The MySQL version is in extended support phase with limited updates and should be planned for migration.

values.name: Mainstream
values.description: The MySQL version is actively supported with regular updates and security patches.

values.name: Unknown
values.description: The support status of the MySQL version could not be determined or is not available.

Edition.description: Specifies the MySQL server edition, indicating the feature set, licensing model, and capabilities available in the discovered MySQL instance.

values.name: Community
values.description: MySQL Community Edition - the open-source version with standard features and community support.

values.name: Enterprise
values.description: MySQL Enterprise Edition - the commercial version with advanced features, tools, and enterprise support.

values.name: Unknown
values.description: The Edition of the MySQL version could not be determined or is not available.

BoolValue.description: Represents an Enum with boolean values.

CustomProperties.description: Represents a custom property with a key and value.

key.description: The name/key of the custom property.

value.description: The value of the custom property.

SoftwareAttributes.description: Contains software-related attributes and metadata for the discovered MySQL server instance.

softwareName.description: The name of the MySQL software or distribution.

providerName.description: The name of the software provider or vendor.

softwareVersion.description: The version of the MySQL software.

softwareId.description: A unique identifier for the software instance.

customProperties.description: Additional custom properties as key-value pairs.

ExtendedLocation.description: Defines the extended location configuration for MySQL Discovery resources deployed outside of Azure, enabling hybrid and on-premises discovery scenarios.

type.description: Specifies the type of extended location (e.g., EdgeZone, CustomLocation) where the MySQL Discovery resource is deployed.

name.description: The unique name identifier of the extended location where the MySQL Discovery resource is deployed.

MySQLSiteList.description: A paginated collection of MySQL discovery sites, allowing efficient retrieval of large sets of discovery environment configurations.

value.description: Collection of MySQL discovery sites returned in the current page of results, each containing site configuration and status information.

nextLink.description: URL link to retrieve the next page of MySQL discovery sites if more results are available beyond the current page.

SummaryList.description: A paged collection of Summary resources.

value.description: Array of Summary resources for the current page.

nextLink.description: URL to fetch the next page of Summary resources, if any.

ErrorSummaryList.description: A paged collection of ErrorSummary resources.

value.description: Array of ErrorSummary resources for the current page.

nextLink.description: URL to fetch the next page of ErrorSummary resources, if any.

HostMachineProperties.description: Contains detailed hardware specifications and resource information for the physical or virtual machine hosting the discovered MySQL server instance.

vCores.description: Total number of virtual CPU cores available on the host machine running the MySQL server.

memoryInMb.description: Total amount of physical memory (RAM) in megabytes available on the host machine running the MySQL server.

totalStorageInGb.description: Total storage capacity in gigabytes available on the host machine for MySQL server data and operations.

mySqlServersCount.description: Count of MySQL server instances currently running or installed on this host machine, indicating server density and resource sharing.

value.description: Array of MySQLServer resources for the current page.

nextLink.description: URL to fetch the next page of MySQLServer resources, if any.

MySQLSite.description: Represents a MySQL discovery site resource that serves as the primary container for organizing and managing MySQL server discovery operations within a specific environment or location.

MySQLSiteProperties.description: Configuration properties and metadata for a MySQL discovery site, including associations with master sites and migration projects.

masterSiteId.description: This property holds the Azure Resource Manager (ARM) identifier for the master site that is mapped to the current MySQL site. It serves as a unique reference to the corresponding master site within the Azure OffAzure infrastructure. The value must be a valid ARM ID that points to a resource of type Microsoft.OffAzure/masterSites. This linkage ensures that the MySQL site is correctly associated with its master site.

provisioningState.description: Gets or sets the provisioning state.

MySQLServer.description: Represents a discovered MySQL server instance with comprehensive metadata including version information, database metrics, host machine properties, and support lifecycle status.

provisioningState.description: Gets or sets the provisioning state.
Gets or sets the provisioning state.

MySQLServerProperties.description: Detailed configuration and metadata properties for a discovered MySQL server, including network settings, version details, database information, and host machine specifications.

supportEndIn.description: Time when mysql version support end.

provisioningState.description: Gets or sets the provisioning state.

deepDiscoveryPerformed.description: Indicates whether Deep Discovery has been performed on the server.

softwareAttributes.description: Software-related attributes and metadata for the discovered MySQL server instance.

runAsAccountId.description: The account ID used to login.

updatedTimeStamp.description: Time when this error was last updated.

value.description: Array of Agent resources for the current page.

nextLink.description: URL to fetch the next page of Agent resources, if any.

servicePrincipalIdentityDetails.description: Service principal identity details used by agent for communication to the service.

migrateApplianceName.description: Name of the appliance on which agent is running.

fabricSiteName.description: Name of the site which enables fabric discovery.

provisioningState.description: Gets or sets the provisioning state.

AgentResourcePatch.description: Object containing tags updates for patch operations.

tenantId.description: Tenant Id for the service principal with which the on-premise management/data plane components would communicate with our Azure services.

applicationId.description: Application/client Id for the service principal with which the on-premise management/data plane components would communicate with our Azure services.

objectId.description: Object Id of the service principal with which the on-premise management/data plane components would communicate with our Azure services.

lastHeartBeatUtc.description: Last heartbeat time of the agent in UTC.

MySQLSitePatchProperties.description: Patch properties for MySQLSite. All properties optional.

MySQLServerPatchProperties.description: Patch properties for MySQLServer. All properties optional.

supportEndIn.description: Time when MySQL version support ends.

deepDiscoveryPerformed.description: Indicates whether Deep Discovery has been performed on the server.

softwareAttributes.description: Software-related attributes and metadata for the discovered MySQL server instance.

SiteNameParameter.name: siteName
SiteNameParameter.description: The unique name identifier of the MySQL discovery site resource within the resource group.

ServerNameParameter.name: serverName
ServerNameParameter.description: The unique name identifier of the discovered MySQL server resource within the discovery site.

AgentNameParameter.name: agentName
AgentNameParameter.description: The unique name identifier of the MySQL discovery agent resource within the discovery site.
